component.name: MyTraL
component.summary: Sovereign athlete training log - train smarter, not harder

description.p: MyTraL is a privacy-first personal sport training log designed to track your athletic activities, manage your gear, and analyze your fitness progress.

ul.li: Universal Activity Tracking: Record and analyze any sport, from running and cycling to weightlifting and hiking.
Smart Gear Management: Monitor usage statistics for shoes, bikes, and components to know exactly when to service or replace them.
Deep Training Insights: Analyze your training load, monitor fitness trends, track goals, and record personal records (PRs).
Holistic Health Tracking: Keep tabs on your weight, general health metrics, custom trails, and training outfits.
Seamless Importing: Bring your data with you. Supports FIT, GPX, TCX, Strava®, Polar®, and more.
100% Local Storage: Your data stays on your machine. No mandatory accounts, no cloud tracking.

description.p: Whether you're training for a marathon or keeping a daily active journal, MyTraL puts your data back in your hands.
